channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ancient enzyme revived to shed light on life's origins on Earth
item.description: Scientists reconstructed long-extinct versions of a key enzyme that helps make nitrogen available, offering a rare look into early Earth.

item.title: AI model speeds up simulation of heavy element formation in neutron star mergers
item.description: A new AI-based simulation dramatically accelerates modeling of how neutron star mergers create many of the universe's heaviest elements.

item.title: New material allows heat to be programmed
item.description: A novel material can control and program heat, directing thermal radiation, switching modes, and retaining settings without power.

item.title: Schrödinger’s anthill: Quantum entanglement found in a crystal large enough to hold
item.description: A centimeter-sized crystal shows clear signs of quantum entanglement, indicating that large, everyday objects can exhibit deep quantum behavior.
